tasks.title: Deploy USDxyz token on MVM chains
tasks.description: Create and deploy USDxyz fungible asset on Chain 1 and Chain 2. Mint tokens to Alice and Bob. Display USDxyz balances in test output. Keep APT for gas only.

subtasks.title: Create USDxyz fungible asset module
subtasks.description: Create a simple FA module for USDxyz token that can be deployed on MVM chains

subtasks.title: Add USDxyz deployment to chain setup scripts
subtasks.description: Update setup-chain.sh or deploy-contracts.sh to deploy USDxyz on both chains

subtasks.title: Mint USDxyz to Alice and Bob
subtasks.description: Add minting step in setup-alice-bob.sh to give Alice and Bob USDxyz tokens

subtasks.title: Display USDxyz balances in test output
subtasks.description: Update test scripts to show USDxyz balances alongside APT balances

subtasks.title: Verify existing tests still pass
subtasks.description: Run MVM E2E tests to ensure adding USDxyz doesn't break anything

tasks.title: Deploy USDxyz token on EVM chain
tasks.description: Create and deploy USDxyz ERC20 token on EVM Chain 3. Mint tokens to test accounts. Display USDxyz balances in test output. Keep ETH for gas only.

subtasks.title: Create USDxyz ERC20 contract
subtasks.description: Create a simple ERC20 contract for USDxyz token (can extend MockERC20)

subtasks.title: Add USDxyz deployment to EVM setup scripts
subtasks.description: Update EVM chain setup to deploy USDxyz ERC20

subtasks.title: Mint USDxyz to test accounts
subtasks.description: Add minting step to give test accounts USDxyz tokens

subtasks.title: Display USDxyz balances in test output
subtasks.description: Update EVM test scripts to show USDxyz balances alongside ETH balances

subtasks.title: Verify existing EVM tests still pass
subtasks.description: Run EVM E2E tests to ensure adding USDxyz doesn't break anything

tasks.title: Update MVM inflow tests to use USDxyz
tasks.description: Modify inflow E2E tests to swap USDxyz instead of APT. Requester sends USDxyz, wants same amount of USDxyz on destination.

subtasks.title: Update inflow intent creation to use USDxyz
subtasks.description: Modify inflow-submit-hub-intent.sh to use USDxyz metadata instead of APT

subtasks.title: Update inflow escrow creation to use USDxyz
subtasks.description: Modify inflow-submit-escrow.sh to lock USDxyz instead of APT

subtasks.title: Update inflow fulfillment to use USDxyz
subtasks.description: Modify inflow-fulfill-hub-intent.sh to transfer USDxyz

subtasks.title: Verify MVM inflow tests pass with USDxyz
subtasks.description: Run full inflow test suite and verify correct USDxyz transfers

tasks.title: Update MVM outflow tests to use USDxyz
tasks.description: Modify outflow E2E tests to swap USDxyz instead of APT. Requester sends USDxyz, wants same amount of USDxyz on destination.

subtasks.title: Update outflow intent creation to use USDxyz
subtasks.description: Modify outflow-submit-hub-intent.sh to use USDxyz metadata instead of APT

subtasks.title: Update outflow solver transfer to use USDxyz
subtasks.description: Modify outflow-solver-transfer.sh to transfer USDxyz

subtasks.title: Update outflow fulfillment to use USDxyz
subtasks.description: Modify outflow-validate-and-fulfill.sh to handle USDxyz

subtasks.title: Verify MVM outflow tests pass with USDxyz
subtasks.description: Run full outflow test suite and verify correct USDxyz transfers

tasks.title: Update EVM inflow tests to use USDxyz
tasks.description: Modify EVM inflow E2E tests to swap USDxyz (ERC20) instead of ETH.

subtasks.title: Update EVM escrow to support ERC20
subtasks.description: IntentEscrow.sol already supports ERC20, created create-escrow-erc20.js script

subtasks.title: Update EVM inflow tests to use USDxyz
subtasks.description: Modify EVM test scripts to use USDxyz ERC20 for swaps

subtasks.title: Verify EVM inflow tests pass with USDxyz
subtasks.description: Run full EVM inflow test suite and verify correct USDxyz transfers

tasks.title: Update EVM outflow tests to use USDxyz
tasks.description: Modify EVM outflow E2E tests to swap USDxyz (ERC20) instead of ETH.

subtasks.title: Update EVM outflow tests to use USDxyz
subtasks.description: Modify EVM outflow test scripts to use USDxyz ERC20 for swaps

subtasks.title: Verify EVM outflow tests pass with USDxyz
subtasks.description: Run full EVM outflow test suite and verify correct USDxyz transfers
